Name: Customer Summary Prompt
Description: Generates a concise summary of a customer's account status and recent activity for use in agent conversations.
Template: Provide a concise account summary for customer {{customerId}}. Include their current tier, recent transactions in the last {{days}} days, and any open support tickets. Format as a brief paragraph suitable for a customer service agent.

Arguments.Name: days
Arguments.Description: Number of days of recent activity to include
